/usr/bin/ar qc libADLMIDI.a CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/adlmidi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/adlmidi_load.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/adlmidi_midiplay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/adlmidi_opl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/adlmidi_private.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/wopl/wopl_file.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/models/model_ail.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/models/model_apogee.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/models/model_dmx.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/models/model_generic.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/models/model_hmi_sos.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/models/model_msadlib.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/models/model_oconnell.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/models/model_win9x.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/adlmidi_sequencer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/nuked_opl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/nuked/nukedopl3.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/nuked_opl3_v174.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/nuked/nukedopl3_174.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/nuked_opl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/nuked/nukedopl2.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/esfmu_opl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/esfmu/esfm.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/esfmu/esfm_registers.c.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/mame_opl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/mame/mame_fmopl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/ymfm_opl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/ymfm_opl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/ymfm/ymfm_adpcm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/ymfm/ymfm_misc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/ymfm/ymfm_opl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/ymfm/ymfm_pcm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/ymfm/ymfm_ssg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ADLMIDI_static.dir/src/inst_db.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libADLMIDI.a
